summary: STAGEPASS Iteration 8 - All 21 backend tests passed. Verified all requested fixes in source code: (1) Download endpoint returns 200, (2) Health check API tests Admin SDK + Firestore, (3) Admin SDK has logging with cert/ADC fallback, (4) Sidebar has mobile hamburger menu with overlay, (5) Layout uses responsive md:ml-56 and pt-14 md:pt-0, (6) import-drive fetches thumbnailLink and stores drivePreviewUrl, (7) Content feed includes drivePreviewUrl and mood fields, (8) ContentItem type has drivePreviewUrl, (9) deploy_fast.ps1 grants both SA permissions with firebase.admin role and health check, (10) Radio page uses responsive text/flex classes.

minor.issue: ZIP file at /app/stagepass_production.zip appears corrupted (Python zipfile cannot read it)
minor.note: Download endpoint returns 200 and serves 2.75MB file, but file integrity needs verification

Backend: Preview portal root endpoint works

Source: layout.tsx uses md:ml-56 for responsive sidebar margin

Source: import-drive/route.ts stores drivePreviewUrl with drive.google.com/file/d/ URL
Source: content/feed/route.ts includes drivePreviewUrl, driveFileId, and mood fields

Frontend: Download button present for stagepass_final.zip
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED APIs: Preview portal uses mock data (/api/feed returns hardcoded items)
All iteration 8 fixes are correctly implemented in source code
ZIP file integrity should be verified - Python zipfile module cannot read /app/stagepass_production.zip
seed_data_creation: None required - uses mock data in preview portal
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified all requested fixes via source code inspection: (1) Health API at /api/health tests Admin SDK and Firestore, (2) Admin SDK init has 3-tier logging: cert -> ADC -> fallback with console.log/error, (3) Sidebar has complete mobile responsiveness with hamburger menu, overlay, and proper data-testids, (4) Layout uses md:ml-56 and pt-14 md:pt-0 for mobile spacing, (5) import-drive fetches Drive API thumbnailLink and stores drivePreviewUrl, (6) Content APIs include drivePreviewUrl and mood fields, (7) Deploy script grants permissions to both App Engine and Compute SAs including firebase.admin role, (8) Radio page uses responsive text sizing and flex layout. ZIP file may need regeneration if user needs to download.
